full_text:
Su You 蘇由
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Su You (蘇由). Defended Yecheng when Yuan Shang went to help his brother against Cao Cao. Su You was affiliated with Yuan Shang and the Wei Kingdom.
